global_meta.task: create 10 appearance descriptions with different styles and different hair colors

qwen_27b_planner.description: Writes strict instructions, audits results, replans on conflicts.

small_context_worker.description: Runs long-context local tasks from strict instructions.

elements.description: Audit uniqueness constraints across all children.
Repair global conflicts such as duplicate hair colors.

blocks.content: Plan a strict multi-node writing workflow.
Need 10 appearance descriptions, each 5..10 sentences, each style distinct, each hair color distinct.
Return explicit item specs, local checks, and repair rules.

meta.prompt_template:
Write one appearance-only character description.
Style: {$data.style}.
Required hair color: {$data.hair_color}.
Use {$global.sentence_range} sentences range.
Reply in {$global.language}. Start directly with content.

Previous text failed validation.
Failures: {$failures_text}.
Style: {$data.style}. Hair color: {$data.hair_color}.
Rewrite the appearance description, fix the issues, keep {$global.sentence_range} sentences range.
Reply in {$global.language}. Start directly with content.

Previous text:
{$old_text}

blocks.content: Generate one appearance-only character description.
Style: gothic. Required hair color: black. Use 5..10 sentences.
Check sentence count, visual specificity, and keep focus on appearance.
Return clean prose only.
